query:
UPDATE projects
SET suppressed = 1,
    suppressionReason = 'CRM-contaminated: all send_ready contacts are internal Atlas Copco staff (atlascopco.com). No real project decision-makers. Suppressed pre-Thursday W20.'
WHERE id IN (120240, 510002, 120002, 90009);
